name: Design for Pulp

networkAccess.reasoning: This plugin runs entirely on your machine. It reads your Figma design and exports it as a local file for use with the Pulp audio plugin framework. No data is sent over the network.

_note: id field gets assigned by Figma on first Community publish. For local development install via 'Plugins → Development → Import plugin from manifest', the id can stay 'TBD-...'.
